Perfect Gifts and Best Decor: - 3D Lamp is a new creative birthday gifts, Christmas gifts, Valentines gifts, unicorn lover, or holiday and festival gifts for kids baby girls boys friends or your lover. Ideal home bedroom decoration.

You can adjust the brightness with remote control, the high quality LED light is soft and harmless to children's eyes. -With low consumption design, it will not be hot after long time working,output power 2-2.5W. Auto-off timer options Lightzz 3D night light has timer setting options (15 minutes, 30 minutes, 1H ~ 12H) that allow you to set it to turn off automatically based on your needs. 3D Visual Effect -These 3D optical illusion lamps are the perfect solution to brightening up your rooms in the coolest way possible. -The way the illusion works is that from further away the lamp looks like a floating 3D object, while it’s actually just a thin sheet of acrylic glass. This illusion is sure to dazzle everyone that sees it. Remote Controller&Smart Touch&Timer - Remote Control makes it much more fun, multiple functions including Power ON/OFF, select among 16 colors, Dimmer, 4 Colors Changing modes. Battery of the remote also safty with MSDS report and UN 38.3 regulation. -The 3d night lamp is designed for children to learn and have fun. Touch the power button on the base to change colors or turn on/off the light.
